title: Better Clientside
description:
This Modpack is work in progress.
It adds a lot of performance and QOL mods.
body:
**This modpack is work in progress**

# Features

## Optimization
Your FPS will increase by a lot.

## Compatibility
Most resource packs that used to work with Optifine will work here too. The same goes for Shaders.

## Bugfixes
Some annoying Vanilla bugs that don‘t change game behavior got fixed.

## Features

### Changing Vanilla

- Better Mount HUD
- Better Statistics Screen
- Fix Keyboard on Linux
- Controlling (improves the Minecraft keybinding menu)
- No Chat Reports
- Better Ping Display
- Dynamic Crosshair

### Adding to Vanilla
- Zoomify
- Litematica, MiniHUD and Tweakeroo (https://github.com/maruohon)
- Presence Footsteps
- Minimap, World map and Chunk claiming system by Xaero
- Simple Voice Chat
- Equipment Compare
- Carpet mod
- Roughly Enough Items and a few addons
- Chat Heads
- Legendary Tooltips

## Resource Packs
- Fresh Animations
- Even Better Enchants
- Enhanced Boss Bars

## Shaders
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
